title: FPS BOOST
description: Massive FPS gains. Zero clutter. Just smooth, responsive gameplay from the moment you launch.
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d171c75830e98a03edf2ba415400e5d3479bc2.png) # **⚡ FPS BOOST – TURN LAG INTO DUST** ### Lag ruins Minecraft. FPS Boost deletes lag. FPS Boost is a performance-first modpack built to push Minecraft to its absolute smoothest state, without breaking the vanilla feel. - No gimmicks. - No clutter. - Just raw speed, stability, and responsiveness. **Whether you're:** - Exploring massive survival worlds - Speed-bridging in intense PvP - Loading giant builds or modded terrain FPS Boost keeps everything silky smooth on any system. - Old laptop. - Mid-range PC. - High-end gaming rig. This pack squeezes every frame possible out of your hardware. ## 🖼️ Preview ### BEFORE ### AFTER ## 🚀 Why Choose FPS Boost? - 🔥 Massive FPS gains with zero gameplay changes - ⚡ Faster loading & smoother rendering - 🎯 Sharper controls and reduced input lag - 🧠 Carefully selected lightweight optimizations - 🖥️ Runs great on low-end → high-end PCs - 🌐 Stable in both singleplayer and multiplayer Every included mod has one strict job: Make Minecraft run better. Nothing more. Nothing unnecessary. ## 🧱 100% Vanilla. **You will get:** - ✅ Pure vanilla gameplay - ✅ Dramatically smoother performance - ✅ A Minecraft experience that finally feels right **You won’t find:** - ❌ New mechanics - ❌ Visual clutter - ❌ Random content mods Once you try FPS Boost, going back feels impossible. ## ❤️ Support the Project **If you enjoy FPS Boost:** - ⭐ Follow the project on Modrinth - 💬 Share it with friends - 🧠 report issues or suggestions Every bit of support helps improve performance for everyone. ## 🏁 Final Word - Minecraft should feel smooth. - Not sluggish. - Not stuttery. - Not frustrating. **FPS Boost fixes that.**
